commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Human maintainer review and contributor runtime proof are needed because the remaining blockers are product/security/cancellation policy, not a concrete autonomous code repair.; Needs attention: The diff has no supply-chain change, but the opt-in shared MCP runtime changes a session isolation boundary and needs maintainer acceptance. commands.review_summary:
The PR removes the reply-operation abort signal from required preflight compaction and adds an opt-in `mcp.runtimeScope: "shared"` mode that lets matching sessions reuse one bundled MCP runtime.

PR surface: Source +156, Tests +261, Docs +14, Generated 0. Total +431 across 12 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main passes the reply-operation abort into required budget compaction and keys MCP runtimes by session id, but I did not run a live slow-provider or MCP process-reuse reproduction.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human maintainer review and contributor runtime proof are needed because the remaining blockers are product/security/cancellation policy, not a concrete autonomous code repair.
